scripts.dev: concurrently -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:reset: rm -f backend/src/db/evaluare.db && npm run init-db --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
